# dfsan_abi_list.txt
#
# DataFlowSanitizer ABI list for Nova.
#
# DFSan requires every function in the process to have a shadow implementation
# with a .dfsan suffix. The system libc, libstdc++, and libc++ are pre-built
# binaries that contain no such shadows, causing link failures on every
# standard library call. This file tells DFSan to treat those functions as
# "uninstrumented" - i.e. their outputs are considered untainted regardless
# of their inputs. This is the standard approach for building real projects
# with DFSan; it means we track taint flow through Nova's own code but stop
# at the stdlib boundary.
#
# If you need to track taint through specific stdlib functions, remove them
# from this list and build an instrumented stdlib (see the MSan workflow for
# how to build LLVM runtimes from source with a sanitizer enabled).
#
# Syntax: fun:<glob_pattern>=<attribute>
#   uninstrumented - DFSan generates a wrapper that returns untainted output
#   discard        - same as uninstrumented (older spelling)
#
# Reference: https://clang.llvm.org/docs/DataFlowSanitizerDesign.html

# ── C standard library ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fun:malloc=uninstrumented
fun:calloc=uninstrumented
fun:realloc=uninstrumented
fun:free=uninstrumented
fun:memcpy=uninstrumented
fun:memmove=uninstrumented
fun:memset=uninstrumented
fun:memcmp=uninstrumented
fun:strlen=uninstrumented
fun:strcpy=uninstrumented
fun:strncpy=uninstrumented
fun:strcmp=uninstrumented
fun:strncmp=uninstrumented
fun:strcat=uninstrumented
fun:strncat=uninstrumented
fun:strchr=uninstrumented
fun:strrchr=uninstrumented
fun:strstr=uninstrumented
fun:snprintf=uninstrumented
fun:vsnprintf=uninstrumented
fun:printf=uninstrumented
fun:fprintf=uninstrumented
fun:fopen=uninstrumented
fun:fclose=uninstrumented
fun:fwrite=uninstrumented
fun:fread=uninstrumented
fun:fflush=uninstrumented
fun:fseek=uninstrumented
fun:ftell=uninstrumented
fun:ftruncate=uninstrumented
fun:ftruncate64=uninstrumented
fun:open=uninstrumented
fun:close=uninstrumented
fun:write=uninstrumented
fun:read=uninstrumented
fun:lseek=uninstrumented
fun:lseek64=uninstrumented

# ── C++ runtime / new-delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
fun:_Znwm=uninstrumented
fun:_Znam=uninstrumented
fun:_ZdlPv=uninstrumented
fun:_ZdaPv=uninstrumented
fun:_ZnwmSt11align_val_t=uninstrumented
fun:_ZnamSt11align_val_t=uninstrumented
fun:__cxa_*=uninstrumented
fun:__gxx_*=uninstrumented

# ── libstdc++ / libc++ standard library ──────────────────────────────────────
fun:_ZNSt*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNKSt*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZSt*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNSs*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNSi*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNSo*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNIoS*=uninstrumented
fun:std::*=uninstrumented

# ── libc++ (clang) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fun:_ZNSt3__1*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNKSt3__1*=uninstrumented

# ── POSIX threads ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fun:pthread_*=uninstrumented

# ── Filesystem (libstdc++ / libc++) ──────────────────────────────────────────
fun:_ZNSt10filesystem*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNSt3__110filesystem*=uninstrumented

# ── Google Test (not under test; treat as uninstrumented infrastructure) ──────
fun:testing::*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZN7testing*=uninstrumented
fun:_ZNK7testing*=uninstrumented
